chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7038 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No.5694/2025 2. For hearing of Misc. No.29147/2017 3. For hearing of main case 17.03.2025 Ms. Zahrah Sehr Vayani, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Usman Tufail Shaikh, advocate for respondent This petition is pending since 2017 and it is assailed a prima facie appealable order rendered under the Cantonment Act. Direct recourse to writ jurisdiction is unwarranted and matter has been kept in abeyance for almost eight years. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
